name: Crustless Zucchini Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 cups chopped zucchini, fresh or frozen
Toasted very fine bread crumbs for coating a 9-inch fluted pie plate and for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet.
2. Add the chopped onion, garlic, zucchini, and mushrooms; sauté until vegetables are tender.
3. In a bowl, beat the eggs and add dry sherry, lemon juice, basil, thyme, oregano, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir in the grated Swiss cheese and Italian cheese.
5. Pour the vegetable mixture into the buttered pie plate.
6. Sprinkle the bread crumbs evenly over the top of the quiche.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40-45 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
